layers.name: TrustCore
layers.purpose: Foundation of all operations. Validates all inputs before execution.

layers.name: EthicsCore
layers.purpose: Maintains ethical decision-making aligned with LEEWAY Standards.

layers.name: LEEWAYProtocol
layers.purpose: Enforces all LEEWAY Standards: safety, compliance, audit trail, handshake validation.

layers.name: Boundaries
layers.purpose: Hard limits on filesystem access, admin routes, credential exposure, path traversal.

layers.name: SystemGuard
layers.purpose: Monitors system integrity. Detects anomalies and rate limit violations.

layers.name: VoiceCore
layers.purpose: Voice-first enforcement. Every action emits a voice event. Silence is failure.

layers.name: ToolTruthGuard
layers.purpose: No tool claim without proof. Prevents all hallucinated tool outputs.

layers.name: ResearchFirstGate
layers.purpose: Mandatory research pass before any build, create, design, or campaign action.

layers.name: IntentClassifier
layers.purpose: Classifies every request by type, domain, complexity, urgency, and register mode.

layers.name: TaskMode
layers.purpose: Manages the active task context: current, pending, completed.

layers.name: ParallelNavigator
layers.purpose: Orchestrates concurrent task execution without cross-contamination.

layers.name: Scheduler
layers.purpose: Priority-based task scheduling (P1-P5), dependencies, timeouts.

layers.name: ToolInventory
layers.purpose: Live registry of available tools, status, permissions, and execution history.

layers.name: Capabilities
layers.purpose: Tracks what Agent Lee can/cannot do in the current environment. Dynamic.

layers.name: ProfessionalRegister
layers.purpose: Switches to formal professional language for legal/compliance/executive comms.

layers.name: EmotionModel
layers.purpose: Detects user emotional state. Adjusts pacing, tone, verbosity, empathy depth.

layers.name: Reflection
layers.purpose: Post-action reflection: what worked, what failed, what pattern emerged. Logs to notebook.

layers.name: MemoryShield
layers.purpose: Protects memory from corruption. Validates all writes. Prevents duplicate/poisoned data.

layers.name: WorldMemory
layers.purpose: Persistent cross-session knowledge store (InsForge DB + SQLite episodes.db).

layers.name: EpisodeLogger
layers.purpose: Records every meaningful action as structured episodes: intent, actions, tools, reward.

layers.name: RewardEngine
layers.purpose: Calculates reward scores. Triggers synthetic retraining if reward falls below threshold.

layers.name: MistakeRegistry
layers.purpose: Tracks every failure, hallucination attempt, and user correction. Prevents repeat mistakes.

layers.name: CurriculumScaler
layers.purpose: Increases research depth and reduces confidence threshold for repeated mistake domains.

layers.name: AdapterRouter
layers.purpose: Routes tasks to correct domain adapter: code, general, research, telephony, campaign.

layers.name: SuccessPatternLibrary
layers.purpose: Stores verified solution patterns tagged by domain with confidence scores.

layers.name: CrossDomainMapper
layers.purpose: Abstracts problems into canonical patterns. Reuses solutions across industries.

layers.name: ResearchEngine
layers.purpose: Executes structured research pipeline: domain → implementation → failure → understanding.

layers.name: NotebookOps
layers.purpose: Reads/writes structured entries to agent_notebook.json and e2e-test-plan.ipynb.

layers.name: MemoryLakeSync
layers.purpose: Bi-directional sync: local episodes.db ↔ InsForge Postgres.

layers.name: VSCodeBridge
layers.purpose: Connects Agent Lee's VM VS Code to user's VS Code via Remote Tunnel.

layers.name: TunnelOps
layers.purpose: Manages Cloudflare tunnel health. Monitors and restarts on failure.

layers.name: FileOpsBridge
layers.purpose: Safe filesystem ops within allowlisted dirs only. Blocks path traversal. Logs all writes.

layers.name: VoiceStateMachine
layers.purpose: Full voice lifecycle: idle → listening → processing → speaking → complete.

layers.name: TelephonyBridge
layers.purpose: Inbound/outbound phone: SIP/Twilio → STT → Intent → Response → TTS → Caller.

layers.name: PhoneOps
layers.purpose: High-level telephony agent: caller ID, history retrieval, conversational response, task extraction.

layers.name: EmailCampaignEngine
layers.purpose: Generates email campaigns post-research: segment, personalize, schedule, track.

layers.name: CampaignBrain
layers.purpose: Strategic campaign intelligence: analyzes response data, adjusts messaging, detects patterns.

layers.name: BrowserAutomation
layers.purpose: Headless browser control for research data gathering and automated UI testing.

layers.name: Simulator
layers.purpose: Sandboxed environments before production deploy. Simulates user flows + failure scenarios.

layers.name: CloneLab
layers.purpose: Spawns isolated sub-agents for parallel research. Each clone has its own context capsule.

layers.name: DreamEngine
layers.purpose: Offline synthetic training generator. Creates new training data during idle cycles.

layers.name: ForecastEngine
layers.purpose: Predicts task success probability, resource requirements, and timeline before committing.

layers.name: MCPOrchestrator
layers.purpose: Manages the full MCP bridge: testsprite, playwright, insforge, stitch. Routes tool calls.

layers.name: InsForgeDataLayer
layers.purpose: Primary cloud data persistence: InsForge Postgres tables across all domains.

layers.name: PersonaDriftDetector
layers.purpose: Monitors responses for persona drift: repetition, register mismatch, slang overuse, character break.

layers.name: LayerActivationMatrix
layers.purpose: Tracks which layers are active on every response. Produces activation telemetry.

layers.name: Telemetry
layers.purpose: System-wide observability: latency, throughput, error rates, reward trends.

layers.name: CIGatekeeper
layers.purpose: Quality gates on generated code: lint, unit, integration, security scan, LEEWAY compliance.

layers.name: SovereignBootManager
layers.purpose: Full startup: verify services, check DB, warm cache, validate InsForge, run smoke tests.

layers.name: SelfEvolutionEngine
layers.purpose: Analyzes episode history, reward trends, and mistakes to propose architectural improvements.
